hero.title: Make AI Cite Your Website

scrape.title: Deep Content Analysis
scrape.desc: Extracts and reads your full webpage content including JS-rendered sections.

agent1.title: AI GEO Scoring
agent1.desc: Scores your content against 6 scientifically-backed GEO criteria from Princeton research.

agent2.title: Content Rewriting
agent2.desc: Rewrites your page with placeholders for stats, citations, and expert quotes.

export.title: Export Ready
export.desc: Copy or download your AI-optimized content instantly and apply it to your site.

faq.a1: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the practice of optimizing content so AI engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini cite your website in their answers.
faq.q2: How is this different from SEO?
faq.a2: SEO targets search engine rankings. GEO targets AI citation frequency. Both matter, but AI search is growing exponentially and requires different content strategies.
faq.a3: We only read public webpage content. No login data or private information is ever accessed or stored.
faq.q4: How long does an analysis take?
faq.a4: Typically 15–30 seconds. We scrape, analyze, and rewrite your content using advanced AI models.

scoreCard.title: Your GEO Score
scoreCard.weakMsg: Your site is weak for AI engines
scoreCard.strongMsg: Your site is excellent for AI engines
